message: Avgun na ave te samadhi!
Gun leva jevi koi seva nathi.
Seva kare to khap jage.
Tapnu ang rakhvu, to nabhi javay.
'What is right?' Is the right way.
Mukhpaththi satsang ane abhyas, bannema khub pragati thashe.
Mahima samagamthi ave.
Mahima samajvo, to divyabhav rahe.
Sar no sar – badhama divyabhav!
Mukhpath helps to build Akshardham within.
Gahrai me utro tabhi satsang ka maja aega.
Jetlu bhajan karyu te avinashi thai gayu!
Ghar sabha karvi e agna chhe.
Pragat guruma pratiti te j moksha!
Kharekhari kamani - Mokshani kamani.
Aksharbrahma satrano lahavo chuksho nahi.
'Mano mali chhe moti vaat...' pad roj vichar sahit gavu.
The Mission of our life: Rajipo!
Swami te Gunatit Swami, Narayan Sahajanand Swami.
Ek nari sada brahmachari.

Agna palvi e swadharma.
To obey [God and guru] is one's duty.
Mukhpath brings us closer to the Satpurush.

Mandirthi andarni ashanti jay.
Mandirs remove inner unrest.

Satpurushma het tetlo satsang.
Love for the Satpurush is the measure of one’s satsang.

Anant janmani sadhananu fal satsang chhe.
The reward of spiritual endeavours over countless births is satsang.

Pran jay toy satsang chhodvo nahi.
Never forsake satsang, regardless of life's difficulties.

Kharekhara bhakta thao to kharekhari drashti thay.
Becoming a genuine devotee leads to clear [spiritual] insight.

Divyabhav e bhakti chhe.
Divyabhav is devotion.

Bhakti kare e Bhakta
One who offers devotion is a devotee
